sessions.details: Recorded 1981-01-21. First TX 13 February 1981. No known commercial release.
Recorded 1973-02-05 (Peel Session). First TX 1973-02-08. No known commercial release.

track_listing.track: 'Too Old To Rock'N'Roll: Too Young To Die (2xLP-Live - Bursting Out)' (Chrysalis)
